title: Gilded [16x]
description: A gold themed bedwars pack made for the 200 stars milestone :)
body:
Guilded [16x] is a milestone pack made to celebrate the fact that my main account recently hit 200 stars in bedwars :)

It mainly consists of green and gold colors throughout the pack, it also adds a custom sky made to enhence your overall experience with it :) (

/!\ The Sky ONLY WORKS WITH Optifine, while you can use the pack without optifine, the sky wont work without it /!\

It is mainly made for 1.8.9 pvp and as you might have guessed, bedwars but it still can be used in other pvp modes like skywars, for exemple.

Here are some ingame screenshots to showcase the pack :

![guilded 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50a8d3b014961af565d932d7fa18ac5e0dccaab1.jpeg)

![guilded 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1266e5cbbf993053546f3b114cb7f0ad4bc5cce.jpeg)

![guilded 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e8567edcc966b6a5afedbb7c292e1ba538aa3a.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
